label: The Gauge Closet
description: The Gauge Closet serves as the Rivet Oathwright’s secured storage room, walled in salvaged ashlar and fitted with a banded iron door bearing civic measure marks. Shelving of oiled planks holds boxed rivets, lock blanks, and sorted fasteners, while peg rails carry bundled chain and tagged strap stock under shop seal. A slate inventory board and fixed wax tag-hooks enforce magistrate-audited counts, and interdiction placards segregate suspect breach-site metal behind a barred rack. The air remains dry and metallic, kept deliberately free of quench mist to prevent rust and falsified weights.
